proven.claim: The proof string is printed iff `p.smt2` is non‑empty.
proven.smt2:
; LINE: 362
; PRINCIPLE: P5  (Semantic Correctness – header printed only if a proof exists)
; The proof string is printed iff `p.smt2` is non‑empty.

(declare-const smt2 String)
(declare-const headerPrinted Bool)
(assert (= headerPrinted (not (= smt2 ""))))

; Violation: header printed while proof is empty
(assert (= smt2 ""))
(assert headerPrinted)

(check-sat)
; sat → reachable bug (header without proof)
